MP7.0

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "21C1",
    "name": "SAV1",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "+12V aprés contact présent": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Adaptatif air": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Apprentissage du mot antivol effectué": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Calculateur protégé par verrou logiciel": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Charge moteur": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Consigne de régime ralenti": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Consommation instantanée de carburant": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Coupure injection": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Demande de mise en route du compresseur de clim": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Demande de ralenti accéléré en provenance de la clim": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Détection vitesse véhicule supérieur à 30 km-h": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Durée ouverture injecteur": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Estompage de couple sur rapport de boite montant ou descendant": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETAIN1": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETAIN2": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETALOG1": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETALOG2": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETAOUT1": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Mis en route du compresseur de clim interdite": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Ouverture de la vanne purge canister": {
        "firstbyte": 22,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Ouverture de la vanne RR": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Phase de purge canister en cours": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Pompe à essence active": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Position papillon absolue mesurée": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Position papillon pied levé": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Position papillon pied levé mesurée": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Position papillon plein gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Position park ou neutre": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Pression absolue collecteur admission mesurée": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Pression atmosphérique": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Pressostat de direction assistée": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Régime moteur": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Régulation de richesse active": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Régulation ralenti active": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Relais anti-percolation activé": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Relais de chauffage sonde à oxygène amont activé": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Remise à zero des pannes mémorisées effectuée": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Sélection pare brise électrique": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5,

        "ref": true

        "ref": true

        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vitesse du véhicule": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Voyant défaut activé": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "21C2",

    "deny_sds": [

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true

    }
  },

    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "31A001",

        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 3,
    "sentbytes": "308001",
    "name": "Status pilotage",

      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",

        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "21E0",
    "name": "Trame configurable",
    "deny_sds": [
